para_trans: About the new title of the Pre-Mantric Scholarship Scheme for the children of parents working in dirty and dangerous occupations.
Department of Social Justice and Fasts Assistance
Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Marg, Mantralaya,
Read: Government Decision EBC-2022 / No. 146 / Education-1D. 20.02.2024

Preamble: - Pre-matric Scholarship Scheme for children of parents working in dirty and hazardous occupations The Government was considering to allow opening of a separate account title for such a scheme as "34-Scholarship" was not the objective title under the Account Title 2225 7 205 of the Scheme.
Jhasan Decision: - Pre-Mantric Scholarship Scheme (State share 40%) for children of parents working in unhygienic and hazardous occupations is being sanctioned with the following heads of accounts.
table_trans: 2225, Welfare of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, Other Backward Classes and Minorities.
